query:
INSERT INTO supply_contracts (
                id, supplier_id, contract_name, contract_number,
                effective_from, effective_until, base_currency,
                payment_due_days, early_payment_discount, early_payment_days,
                minimum_invoice_amount, billing_cycle, volume_discounts,
                status, notes, created_at, updated_at
            ) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
            ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
                contract_name = VALUES(contract_name),
                contract_number = VALUES(contract_number),
                effective_from = VALUES(effective_from),
                effective_until = VALUES(effective_until),
                base_currency = VALUES(base_currency),
                payment_due_days = VALUES(payment_due_days),
                early_payment_discount = VALUES(early_payment_discount),
                early_payment_days = VALUES(early_payment_days),
                minimum_invoice_amount = VALUES(minimum_invoice_amount),
                billing_cycle = VALUES(billing_cycle),
                volume_discounts = VALUES(volume_discounts),
                status = VALUES(status),
                notes = VALUES(notes),
                updated_at = VALUES(updated_at)
